site.name: Unterhecherhof
site.description: Experience the heart of Tyrol. Our family-run B&B offers an authentic farm stay experience with modern amenities and stunning views.

directions.fromLienz: Take the B100 west towards Sillian. After about 3km, turn right towards Bannberg. Follow the winding mountain road for 4km until you reach the village.
directions.winterDriving: Winter tires are mandatory from November to April. Snow chains are recommended during heavy snowfall.

hero.title: Authentic Alpine Farm Stay in Bannberg, Tyrol
hero.subtitle: Experience the charm of a historic farmhouse nestled in the heart of the Dolomites.

about.title: Family-Run Hospitality
about.description: Our historic farmhouse has been lovingly renovated to offer modern comfort while preserving its authentic Tyrolean soul. Experience true Alpine life with the Unterhecher family, where tradition meets comfort in the peaceful village of Bannberg.

features.title: Why Stay With Us?
features.subtitle: Authentic experiences in the heart of the mountains

items.title: Mountain Views
items.description: Panoramic vistas of the Lienz Dolomites from every window.

items.title: Quiet Village
items.description: Find absolute peace in the tranquil atmosphere of Bannberg.

items.title: Farm Breakfast
items.description: Start your day with fresh local milk, eggs, and homemade treats.

items.title: Hospitality
items.description: Genuine warmth and personal care from your hosts.

roomsSection.title: Our Accommodations
roomsSection.subtitle: Cozy spaces designed for your comfort

reviews.title: Exceptional Guest Rating
reviews.subtitle: Based on over 200 verified reviews from our wonderful guests.

items.quote: The most beautiful farmhouse I've ever stayed in. The breakfast is incredible and the hosts make you feel like part of the family.
items.author: Sarah & Mark, UK

items.quote: The view from the balcony is breathtaking. Everything was perfectly clean and the renovation was done with so much taste.
items.author: Hans Müller, Germany
